overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2x Long SNAP Daily ETF (SNAG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement ofSnap, Inc. (NYSE: SNAP)stock, less fees, and expenses SNAG was launched on Dec 18, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
